name: semantic_rrf
description: LEG P1 experiment arm: the `semantic` config plus REVIEN_HYBRID=rrf — anchor selection replaced by Reciprocal Rank Fusion (k=60 unless REVIEN_RRF_K) of the keyword-ranked and semantic-ranked candidate lists. Walk/scoring/rerank unchanged. Ingest is identical to `semantic` (the fusion is retrieval-only), so db-cache snapshots are interchangeable.
